arts.ttl: Real Madrid suffer last-minute injury blow
arts.sum: The training session ahead of the game against Rayo Vallecano also included several youth players: goalkeepers Fran González, Mestre and Súnico, defenders Laimini Fati, Fortea and Diego Aguado and striker Barroso . Real Madrid faces defensive concerns ahead of their LaLiga clash against Rayo Vallecano this Sunday 9 March at 11:15am ET in the 27th round of the competition.

arts.ttl: Guler offered career-defining transfer chance amid Real Madrid frustration
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt are interested in Real Madrid attacker Arda Guler, which presents an opportunity the youngster can't afford to pass up. Guler offered career-defining transfer chance amid Real Madrid frustration

arts.ttl: Revealed: Real Madrid 'could still pay transfer fee to Liverpool for Trent Alexander-Arnold' - despite the full back's Anfield contract expiring this summer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are ready to pay a fee to get their hands on Trent Alexander-Arnold before his contract expires with Liverpool on June 30, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Rayo Vallecano: Los Blancos star 'a major doubt' for La Liga showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender Antonio Rudiger is allegedly a major doubt for Sunday's La Liga clash with Rayo Vallecano due to illness.
